title: atelanthera perpusilla
intro: Atelanthera perpusilla, also known as "Perpusilla", is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Atelanthera perpusilla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Atelanthera perpusilla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
